NULLED:NCT03734029.name: DESTINY-Breast04
NULLED:NCT03734029.group: Previously-treated HER2-low metastatic BC, T-DXd 5.4 mg/kg Q3W vs physician-choice chemo
NULLED:NCT03734029.snippet: Source: Modi S et al. N Engl J Med 2022;387:9-20 (DESTINY-Breast04).

evidence.label: Enrollment
evidence.text: 557 patients with unresectable/metastatic HER2-low breast cancer (IHC 1+ or 2+/ISH-) who had received 1-2 prior lines of chemotherapy randomized 2:1 open-label to trastuzumab deruxtecan 5.4 mg/kg IV Q3W (n=373) or physician-choice standard single-agent chemotherapy (capecitabine, eribulin, gemcitabine, paclitaxel, or nab-paclitaxel; n=184).

evidence.label: Primary - PFS in HR+ HER2-Low Cohort
evidence.text: Median PFS in hormone-receptor-positive cohort (n=494): T-DXd 10.1 months vs chemo 5.4 months; hazard ratio 0.51 (95% CI 0.40 to 0.64; P<0.001). Primary endpoint met.

evidence.label: Secondary - OS and All HER2-Low
evidence.text: Overall survival (HR+ cohort): T-DXd 23.9 months vs chemo 17.5 months; HR 0.64 (95% CI 0.48-0.86). In all HER2-low patients (including HR-), PFS HR 0.50 (0.40-0.63) and OS HR 0.64 (0.49-0.84). Benefit consistent across HR+ and HR-.

evidence.label: Risk of Bias (RoB 2.0)
evidence.text: D1 LOW - central IVR randomization stratified by HER2 status and prior lines. D2 SOME CONCERNS - open-label (T-DXd Q3W IV vs heterogeneous physician-choice chemo regimens). D3 LOW - 92% PFS follow-up. D4 LOW - central BICR-adjudicated PFS. D5 LOW - SAP locked.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Is the age of majority in their country~* Has pathologically documented breast cancer that:~  1. Is unresectable or metastatic~ 2. Has low-HER2 expression defined as IHC 2+/ISH- or IHC 1+ (ISH- or untested)~ 3. Is HR-positive or HR-negative~ 4. Has progressed on, and would no longer benefit from, endocrine therapy~ 5. NULLED:NCT04494425.name: DESTINY-Breast06
NULLED:NCT04494425.group: HR+ HER2-low or HER2-ultralow mBC post-endocrine, T-DXd vs chemo (PFS primary)

allOutcomes.title: PFS in the intent-to-treat HER2-low + HER2-ultralow

NULLED:NCT04494425.snippet: Source: Curigliano G et al. N Engl J Med 2024;391:2082-2094 (DESTINY-Breast06).

evidence.label: Enrollment
evidence.text: 866 patients with hormone-receptor-positive, HER2-low (IHC 1+ or 2+/ISH-) or HER2-ultralow (IHC >0<1+) metastatic breast cancer who had progressed on >=2 prior endocrine therapies (chemotherapy-naive for metastatic setting) randomized 1:1 open-label to T-DXd 5.4 mg/kg Q3W (n=436) or physician-choice chemotherapy (capecitabine, nab-paclitaxel, or paclitaxel; n=430).

evidence.label: Primary - PFS in HR+/HER2-Low
evidence.text: Median PFS in HR+/HER2-low cohort: T-DXd 13.2 months vs chemo 8.1 months; hazard ratio 0.62 (95% CI 0.51 to 0.74; P<0.001). Primary endpoint met. BICR-confirmed PFS.

evidence.label: Secondary - ITT PFS and HER2-Ultralow
evidence.text: ITT PFS (HER2-low + HER2-ultralow): T-DXd 13.2 months vs chemo 8.1 months; HR 0.63 (95% CI 0.53-0.75). HER2-ultralow subgroup: HR 0.78 (0.50-1.21). Overall response rate T-DXd 57% vs chemo 31%.

evidence.label: Risk of Bias (RoB 2.0)
evidence.text: D1 LOW - central IVR stratified by prior lines and HER2 level. D2 SOME CONCERNS - open-label (T-DXd IV vs physician-choice chemo). D3 LOW - 94% PFS follow-up. D4 LOW - BICR-adjudicated. D5 LOW - SAP locked.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 18 Years; max age 105 Years; healthy volunteers: f. title: RapidMeta Oncology | Trastuzumab Deruxtecan in HER2-Low Metastatic Breast Cancer v1.1
